features.name: Project Setup with Cross-Reference Documentation System
features.description: Initialize the TDental Dashboard with a comprehensive cross-reference documentation pattern. Every component, function, and type must include inline comments tracking where it's used across the codebase. Create a maintainable architecture with mock data.
steps: Create /website folder with Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind
Set up project structure: src/components/, src/pages/, src/hooks/, src/types/, src/data/, src/lib/
Create CROSS_REF.md documenting the cross-reference comment pattern
Copy UI components from frontend-truth with added @crossref comments
Copy layout components (Sidebar, Header, DashboardLayout) with @crossref comments
Copy and adapt modules with @crossref documentation:
- StatCardModule - used in: Overview, Reports, LocationDetail
- ProductTableModule - used in: Customers, Employees, Services
Set up React Router with route definitions and @crossref comments
Create types/index.ts with all interfaces and @crossref comments showing component relationships
Create mock data services with @crossref comments indicating which components consume the data
Create src/lib/crossref.ts - utility to validate cross-references at build time
Set up shared constants with @crossref documentation
Configure Tailwind theme with dental clinic colors

features.name: Overview Dashboard with Cross-References
features.description: Build Overview dashboard with StatsCards, Today's Schedule, Quick Actions, Notifications, Revenue Chart. All components must have @crossref comments showing where else they're used.
steps: Build DashboardStats component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Reports, LocationDashboard]
Build TodaySchedule component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, CalendarPage] // @crossref:uses[AppointmentCard, TimeSlot]
Build QuickActionsBar component with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Sidebar] // @crossref:uses[CustomerModal, AppointmentModal]
Add filter by location - state managed in @crossref:used-in[Overview, Calendar, Customers, Appointments]
Wire up mock data from src/data/mock/ with @crossref comments

features.name: Calendar Page with Day/Week/Month Views
features.description: Build Calendar with appointment scheduling. Components must track cross-references to Overview (TodaySchedule), Appointments (forms), and Customers (profiles).
steps: Build DayView component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar] // @crossref:uses[TimeSlot, AppointmentCard, DragDropProvider]
Build TimeSlot component with @crossref:used-in[CalendarDayView, CalendarWeekView, OverviewTodaySchedule]
Build AppointmentCard component with @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Overview, Appointments] // @crossref:uses[CustomerAvatar, StatusBadge]
Add FilterByLocation - shared with @crossref:used-in[Overview, Calendar, Customers, Appointments, Employees]
Add FilterByDoctor - shared with @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Appointments, Employees]
Add color coding system - constants @crossref:used-in[Calendar, Appointments, Overview]

features.name: Customers List, Search, and Profile
features.description: Build Customers management with searchable table and profile view. Cross-reference with Appointments (linked), Payment (balance), Services (history).
steps: Build SearchBar component with @crossref:used-in[Customers, Employees, Services, Website]
Build DataTable component with @crossref:used-in[Customers, Employees, Services, Locations, Reports]
Build CustomerProfile component with @crossref:used-in[Customers] // @crossref:uses[PhotoGallery, DepositCard, AppointmentHistory, ServiceHistory]
Create hooks/useCustomers.ts with @crossref:used-in[Customers, Appointments, Payment, Services]
Add filter components shared across pages

features.name: Customer Forms with Cross-References
features.description: Build Add/Edit Customer forms. Track relationships to Location selector (shared) and ReferralCode input (used in Employees).
steps: Build form fields with @crossref comments on each input component
Build LocationSelector dropdown with @crossref:used-in[CustomerForm, EmployeeForm, AppointmentForm, ServiceForm]
Create form validation hooks with @crossref:used-in[CustomerForm, EmployeeForm, AppointmentForm]
Add photo upload with @crossref:uses[ImageUpload] shared component

features.name: Appointments Management
features.description: Build appointment creation, check-in flow, status workflow. Cross-reference with Calendar (shared components), Customers (linked), Services (conversion).
steps: Build AppointmentForm with @crossref:used-in[Appointments, Calendar, Overview] // @crossref:uses[CustomerSelector, DoctorSelector, LocationSelector]
Build ConvertToService button with @crossref:used-in[Appointments] // links to ServiceForm

features.name: Service Records with Cross-References
features.description: Build service/treatment records. Track links to Appointments, Customers, Payment, and multi-visit tracking.
steps: Build ServiceForm with @crossref:used-in[Services, Appointments] // @crossref:uses[ServiceCatalogSelector, CustomerSelector, DoctorSelector]

features.name: Payment and Deposit Wallet System
features.description: Build payment system with deposits, partial payments, outstanding balance. Cross-reference with Customers (profile), Services (payment due).
steps: Build PaymentForm with @crossref:used-in[Payment, Services] // @crossref:uses[CustomerSelector, ServiceSelector, PaymentMethodSelector]

features.name: Monthly Payment Plans
features.description: Build installment plans for outstanding balances. Cross-reference with Payment (history), Customers (profile).

features.name: Employees Management
features.description: Build employee list, profiles, tier/role assignment. Cross-reference with Customers (referral code), Appointments (doctor selector), Locations.
steps: Create hooks/useEmployees.ts with @crossref:used-in[Employees, Appointments, Calendar, Customers]

features.name: Locations and Branches
features.description: Build location management. Cross-reference with Customers (linking), Employees (assignment), Overview (filter).
steps: Create hooks/useLocations.ts with @crossref:used-in[Locations, Customers, Employees, Appointments, Overview]

features.name: Website CMS Management
features.description: Build CMS for 14 public website pages. Cross-reference with Settings (service catalog), Locations (branch listings).

features.name: Settings and Configuration
features.description: Build settings for service catalog, roles, customer sources. Cross-reference with Website (service catalog), Employees (roles), Customers (sources).

features.name: Relationships and Permissions Matrix
features.description: Build permission system and entity relationship management. Cross-reference with ALL pages (permissions).
steps: Build PermissionMatrix with @crossref:used-in[Relationships] // controls access to all pages
Build LinkManager with @crossref:used-in[Relationships] // manages Customer↔Employee, Employee↔Location, etc.

features.name: Commission System - Placeholder
features.description: PLACEHOLDER - Commission pages with cross-reference markers. Will be expanded when business logic is defined.
steps: Create src/pages/Commission/ with PLACEHOLDER markers and @crossref:used-in[Employees, Reports]
Add placeholder components with cross-reference documentation for future implementation

features.name: Reports - Placeholder
features.description: PLACEHOLDER - Reports pages with cross-reference markers. Will be expanded when report specifications are defined.
steps: Create src/pages/Reports/ with PLACEHOLDER markers and @crossref:uses[RevenueChart, DataTable, StatCard]
Add placeholder components referencing existing chart/table components

features.name: SMS/Email Notifications - Placeholder
features.description: PLACEHOLDER - Notification system placeholders. Cross-reference with Payment (triggers).
steps: Add PLACEHOLDER markers in Payment page for SMS/Email notifications
